label: Temple of the Rift-Vigil
description: The Temple of the Rift-Vigil occupies a buttressed basalt nave sealed behind layered blast-doors and ash baffles, its exterior clad in slagcrete ribs that shed the city’s abrasive gales. Inside, soot-black pillars rise to a vaulted ceiling webbed with copper grounding lattices, built to bleed off the electrostatic charge that regularly scours Ashenward City. Violet auroral glare enters through narrow prisms of auroraglass, casting hard-edged bands of light across votive plinths and shielded reliquary recesses. Vox-silencing insulation and redundant beacon housings make the sanctuary a liturgical relay point as well as a place of devotion under the fracture of long-range transmission.
